highlights_headline: SkiaSharp 4.151.0 updates to Skia milestone m151 and delivers several zero-allocation performance fixes.
highlights_body: This release advances the bundled Skia engine to m151, fixes WASM build compatibility, and improves performance across HarfBuzzSharp and SKColor parsing with allocation-free code paths.

bullets.detail: The bundled Skia engine advances to m151, bringing upstream rendering improvements, bug fixes, and performance work.
Additional cherry-picked fixes from the Skia chrome/m151 branch have been merged for improved stability.
A Skia submodule fix drops an SK_BUILD_FOR_WASM redefinition that caused WebAssembly build failures.

bullets.lead: SKColor hex parsing optimized with ReadOnlySpan<char> overloads
bullets.detail: SKColor hex parsing is rewritten for speed and two new ReadOnlySpan<char> overloads are added, reducing allocations in hot parsing paths.

bullets.lead: Unnecessary unsafe modifier removed from GRContextOptions
bullets.detail: The unsafe modifier on GRContextOptions has been removed where it was not required, improving API clarity.

bullets.lead: Native resource leak in SKImage.FromEncodedData fixed
bullets.detail: A native resource leak that occurred when calling SKImage.FromEncodedData(SKData, SKRectI) is now correctly disposed.

contributor_summaries.ramezgerges: Fixed the WASM build by bumping the Skia submodule to drop the SK_BUILD_FOR_WASM redefinition, and contributed the cross-backend golden-image visual regression test harness

preview_summaries.4.151.0-p1: Preview 1 updated the bundled Skia engine to milestone m151, restored WASM build compatibility, added SKColor span overloads, removed the unsafe modifier from GRContextOptions, and fixed a native resource leak in SKImage.FromEncodedData.

harfbuzz_summary: Delivers two allocation-free performance improvements: Buffer.AddUtf8(string) now uses a pooled UTF-8 encoder to avoid per-call allocations, and Tag.Parse eliminates its per-call char[4] array.
